name: @annoyingmouse/wc-trim-middle
description: This web component was inspired by Chris Heilmann and does not trim strings that don’t fit the space at the end, but in the middle of the string

scripts.release: npm run build && git add -A && git commit -m "chore: release artifacts" && git push && git push --tags && npm publish --access public
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && npm run release
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && npm run release
scripts.release:major: npm version major && npm run release

author: Dominic Myers
